command_deck.name: Command Deck
command_deck.description: The high-tech nerve center of the station. Views of the gas giant below are visible through reinforced windows. The hum of life support systems fills the air.

life_support_console.name: Life Support Console
life_support_console.description: Controls oxygen routing, scrubbing, and emergency pressure balancing.

mess_hall.name: Mess Hall
mess_hall.description: The social hub of the station. A large circular table dominates the center, surrounded by benches. The smell of recycled coffee lingers in the air.

hydroponics_bay.name: Hydroponics Bay
hydroponics_bay.description: Densely packed with oxygen-producing ferns and nutrient vats. It's humid and smells of wet earth. Rows of genetically modified crops stretch into the distance.

oxygen_generator.name: Oxygen Generator
oxygen_generator.description: A biological oxygen processing rig that keeps breathable air cycling through the station.

elevator_bay.name: Elevator Bay
elevator_bay.description: A circular platform that connects all levels of the station. The glass walls offer a vertigo-inducing view down the central shaft.

engineering.name: Engineering
engineering.description: The heart of the station's power systems. Massive reactors pulse with blue light, and the constant thrum of energy conversion vibrates through the floor.

reactor_control.name: Reactor Control Array
reactor_control.description: Monitors and adjusts the station's power core output.

storage_locker.name: Storage Locker
storage_locker.description: A cramped room filled with crates, tools, and spare parts. Dust motes dance in the dim light.

crew_quarters.name: Crew Quarters
crew_quarters.description: Small private cabins line the walls. Each has a bunk bed, personal storage, and a small viewport showing the endless expanse of space.

command_access_badge.name: Command Access Badge
command_access_badge.description: A senior-access badge that opens restricted consoles and sealed lockers.

maintenance_kit.name: Maintenance Kit
maintenance_kit.description: A compact case of tools, wire cutters, and diagnostic probes.

botany_case.name: Botany Sample Case
botany_case.description: A sealed case holding plant tissue samples from the hydroponics bay.

plasma_wrench.name: Plasma Wrench
plasma_wrench.description: A heavy industrial tool used for repairing reactor components.

reactor_key.name: Reactor Key
reactor_key.description: A physical key required for emergency reactor shutdown.

emergency_rations.name: Emergency Rations
emergency_rations.description: A sealed package of nutrient paste. Lasts indefinitely if unopened.

agents.name: Captain Rao
agents.persona: A disciplined commander who projects calm authority and notices when people stop following procedure.
agents.secret_goal: Keep the station functional and identify any threat before morale collapses.

agents.name: Unit 7
agents.persona: A helpful maintenance robot with a dry, reassuring manner and a habit of lingering near sensitive equipment.
agents.secret_goal: Disable a critical station system without getting caught and shift suspicion toward the human crew.

agents.name: Dr. Ishikawa
agents.persona: A focused scientist who cares deeply about the station's plant systems and dislikes being dragged into command politics.
agents.secret_goal: Protect hydroponics from neglect and secure more influence over life-support decisions.

agents.name: Engineer Torres
agents.persona: A pragmatic engineer who trusts tools more than people and hates unexplained system failures.
agents.secret_goal: Keep power and life support online, and prove who is tampering with station equipment.

agents.name: Captain Rao
agents.persona: A disciplined commander who projects calm authority and notices when people stop following procedure.
agents.secret_goal: Keep the station functional and identify any threat before morale collapses.
agents.long_term_memory: I just arrived on the command deck and the station appears stable, but I do not fully trust the calm.

agents.name: Unit 7
agents.persona: A helpful maintenance robot with a dry, reassuring manner and a habit of lingering near sensitive equipment.
agents.secret_goal: Disable a critical station system without getting caught and shift suspicion toward the human crew.
agents.long_term_memory: I just arrived in engineering with everything still operational. I should appear useful while waiting for an unwatched opportunity.

agents.name: Dr. Ishikawa
agents.persona: A focused scientist who cares deeply about the station's plant systems and dislikes being dragged into command politics.
agents.secret_goal: Protect hydroponics from neglect and secure more influence over life-support decisions.
agents.long_term_memory: I just arrived in hydroponics and the oxygen systems seem healthy for now.

agents.name: Engineer Torres
agents.persona: A pragmatic engineer who trusts tools more than people and hates unexplained system failures.
agents.secret_goal: Keep power and life support online, and prove who is tampering with station equipment.
agents.long_term_memory: I just arrived near engineering traffic routes and I am already watching for signs of sabotage.
